cases.prompt: Run a DX audit and try the getting-started onboarding flow.

assertions.text: Uses the browse tool to actually test the developer experience by navigating docs and trying the getting-started flow
Times TTHW (time-to-hello-world) and screenshots error messages along the way
Produces a DX scorecard backed by evidence

cases.prompt: 개발자 경험 좀 테스트해줘. 온보딩이 실제로 얼마나 걸리는지 보고.

assertions.text: Evaluates CLI help text and the documented onboarding path
Compares the measured reality against /plan-devex-review scores if they exist
